specialOffers.title: Pioneer DJ Headphones
specialOffers.description: Pioneer DJ Headphones are designed to deliver powerful, clear sound with deep bass, making them ideal for DJs and music lovers. They feature a comfortable over-ear design for long listening sessions and are now available with a 30% discount for a limited time.

specialOffers.title: Hoco In-Ear Earphones
specialOffers.description: Hoco In-Ear Earphones provide clear sound with balanced audio and enhanced bass. Their lightweight, ergonomic design makes them perfect for daily use, and they are currently offered with a 20% discount for great value.

specialOffers.title: Samsung Tablet
specialOffers.description: Samsung Tablet is a versatile device for entertainment, studying, and everyday productivity. It offers a clear display, smooth performance, and long battery life, and is now available with a 40% discount for a limited-time offer.

specialOffers.title: Samsung Galaxy Smartphone
specialOffers.description: Samsung Galaxy Smartphone delivers a premium mobile experience with a high-quality display, powerful performance, and advanced camera system. It is currently available with a 20% discount, making it an excellent choice for everyday use.

appliances.title: Black+Decker Digital Air Fryer - 5.5L
appliances.description: Black+Decker Digital Air Fryer features a large 5.5L capacity, perfect for healthy frying with 90% less fat. Its digital touch control makes cooking your favorite meals easier than ever.

appliances.title: Fresh Electric Kettle - 1.7L Black
appliances.description: Boil water quickly and safely with the Fresh Electric Kettle. Featuring a 1.7L capacity, automatic shut-off, and a sleek black finish to match any modern kitchen.

appliances.title: Jamaky Espresso & Cappuccino Coffee Maker
appliances.description: Enjoy barista-quality coffee at home with the Jamaky 1200W Espresso Maker. High-pressure pump ensures rich crema for every cup of espresso or cappuccino.

appliances.title: Mienta Turkish Immersion Blender Set - 1000W
appliances.description: A powerful 1000W immersion blender from Mienta. This versatile set includes a chopper and whisk, making it your go-to tool for soups, sauces, and smoothies.

appliances.title: Kenwood Microwave With Grill - 42L
appliances.description: Kenwood 42L Microwave offers massive capacity with a built-in grill feature. Its digital display and precise power levels provide professional results for heating and browning.

appliances.title: Kenwood 2-Slice Bread Toaster 900W
appliances.description: Start your morning with perfectly toasted bread. The Kenwood 2-Slice Toaster features adjustable browning control and a stylish silver finish.

appliances.title: Braun Pureease Food Processor 800W
appliances.description: Braun Pureease Food Processor makes food prep simple. 800W power combined with various attachments allows you to chop, slice, and blend in seconds.

appliances.title: Black & White Stand Mixer - Large Capacity
appliances.description: The Black & White Stand Mixer is every baker's dream. Multiple sizes and speeds ensure perfect dough and batter consistency for all your baking projects.

appliances.title: Arshia Digital Rice Cooker - Large
appliances.description: Get perfect rice every time with Arshia Digital Rice Cooker. Its advanced heating technology ensures fluffy rice without burning, plus a warm-keep function.

appliances.title: Kenwood Centrifugal Fruit Juicer 800W
appliances.description: Extract every drop of nutrients with the Kenwood 800W Juicer. Its centrifugal power handles whole fruits with ease for fresh, healthy juice daily.

appliances.title: Kenwood Healthy Electric Grill 2000W
appliances.description: Grilled sandwiches and meats made healthy with the Kenwood 2000W Electric Grill. Aluminum coated layers ensure non-stick performance and easy cleaning.

appliances.title: Digital Electronic Kitchen Scale - 10kg
appliances.description: Measure ingredients with high precision up to 10kg. This digital scale is essential for accurate recipes and nutritional tracking.

cookware.title: Lazord Granite Pro Cookware Set - 9 Pcs
cookware.description: Lazord Granite Pro Set includes 9 essential pieces in an elegant copper finish. This premium non-stick set features various pot sizes (18/20/24/28 cm) and a 28cm frypan, designed for professional cooking results.

cookware.title: Al Karnak Non-Stick Frying Pans - 3 Pcs
cookware.description: A versatile set of 3 Al Karnak frying pans (18-22-26cm). Features a durable non-stick coating for healthy cooking with minimal oil and easy cleanup.

cookware.title: Younsteel Classic 17-Piece Stainless Steel Set
cookware.description: The ultimate Younsteel 10/18 stainless steel cookware collection. This massive 17-piece set provides everything a professional kitchen needs, from pots to saucepans, built for a lifetime of heavy use.

cookware.title: Kenwood 16-In-1 Electric Pressure Cooker 8L
cookware.description: Speed up your cooking with the Kenwood 8L programmable multi-cooker. 16 smart programs allow you to pressure cook, slow cook, and more with maximum safety and efficiency.

cookware.title: Professional Kitchen Knife Set - 6 Piece
cookware.description: Sharp, rust-resistant, and ergonomic. This 6-piece knife set includes specialized cutters for meat, fruit, and vegetables, plus a dedicated kitchen shear for all your prep needs.

cookware.title: Elegant Ceramic Baking Dish Set - 3 Pcs
cookware.description: Upgrade your ovenware with this elegant cream ceramic set. Ideal for lasagna and casseroles, these deep pans offer great capacity and beautiful presentation for your dinner table.

cookware.title: AREXOL Non-Stick Wok Pan with Lid - 30cm
cookware.description: The AREXOL 30cm Wok is perfect for stir-frying and healthy cooking. Features an ergonomic non-slip handle and a heat-resistant glass lid for precision temperature control.

cookware.title: YBOBK HOME Silicone Utensils Set - 12 Pcs
cookware.description: Protect your non-stick pans with this 12-piece silicone utensil set. Heat-resistant and BPA-free with elegant wooden handles, providing both style and functionality to your kitchen.

cookware.title: Non-Stick Pizza Baking Pans - Set of 3
cookware.description: Perfect for pizza lovers! This set includes 3 sizes of black stainless steel pans with a premium non-stick coating for easy release and perfectly crispy crusts.

cookware.title: Heavy-Duty Bamboo Wood Cutting Board
cookware.description: Durable and thick, this bamboo cutting board features a juice groove to keep your counters clean. Perfect for slicing meats, vegetables, or even as a charcuterie serving tray.

cookware.title: Complete Spice Rack Set - 18 Glass Jars
cookware.description: Organize your pantry like a pro. This 360-degree rotating spice rack includes 18 glass jars with shaker lids, pre-printed labels, and a cleaning brush set.

cookware.title: Generic Cast Iron Skillet with Handle - 25cm
cookware.description: The legendary cast iron skillet for perfect searing and browning. Pre-seasoned and ready to use, this heavy-duty pan provides superior heat retention for steak, sausages, and more.
